segments.text: ANDREW: Good morning, Clare House Hotel.
segments.translation: 安德鲁：早上好，这里是克莱尔豪斯酒店。

segments.text: Andrew speaking. I'm the Events Manager.
segments.translation: 为您接线的是安德鲁。我是活动经理。

segments.text: SAM: Good morning, Andrew. My name's Samantha.
segments.translation: 萨姆：早上好，安德鲁。我的名字是萨姆莎。

segments.text: I'm arranging a party for my parents' fiftieth wedding anniversary, and I'm ringing to ask about hiring a room some time next September.
segments.translation: 我正在为我父母五十周年结婚纪念日策划一个派对，我打电话来是想在明年9月某个时候租用一个房间。

segments.text: Also my parents and several of the guests will need accommodation.
segments.translation: 我的父母和一些客人将需要住宿。

segments.text: ANDREW: OK, I'm sure we can help you with that.
segments.translation: 安德鲁：好的，我相信我可以帮到您。

segments.text: Will you be having a sit-down meal or a buffet?
segments.translation: 你们是要桌宴还是自助餐？

segments.text: SAM: Probably a sit-down.
segments.translation: 萨姆：应该是桌宴。

segments.text: ANDREW: And do you know how many people there'll be?
segments.translation: 安德鲁：您知道会有多少人吗？

segments.text: SAM: Around eighty, I think.
segments.translation: 萨姆：我想大概是80人左右。

segments.text: ANDREW: Well we have two rooms that can hold that number.
segments.translation: 安德鲁：我们有两个可以容纳那么多人的房间。

segments.text: One is the Adelphi Room.
segments.translation: 一间是阿德尔菲厅。

segments.text: That can seat eighty-five, or hold over a hundred if people are standing for a buffet.
segments.translation: 它可以容纳85人，或者如果大家是站着吃自助餐的话，可以容纳100人以上。

segments.text: SAM: Right.
segments.translation: 萨姆：好的。

segments.text: ANDREW: If you have live music, there's room for four or five musicians in the gallery overlooking the room.
segments.translation: 安德鲁：如果您需要现场音乐，长廊那里有个地方可以俯瞰整个房间，能够容纳四五个乐手。

segments.text: Our guests usually appreciate the fact that the music can be loud enough for dancing, but not too loud for conversation.
segments.translation: 我们的客人通常会很满意这一点，音乐大到足够跳舞，但又不会打扰到人们的交谈。

segments.text: SAM: Yes, I really don't like it when you can't talk.
segments.translation: 萨姆：是的，我真的不喜欢音乐大到无法交谈。

segments.text: ANDREW: Exactly. Now the Adelphi Room is at the back of the hotel, and there are French windows leading out onto the terrace.
segments.translation: 安德鲁：的确如此。阿德尔菲厅位于酒店的后面，那里设有通往露台的落地窗。

segments.text: This has a beautiful display of pots of roses at that time of the year.
segments.translation: 每年的那个时候，都有漂亮的盆栽玫瑰花展览。

segments.text: SAM: Which direction does it face?
segments.translation: 萨姆：它面朝哪个方向？

segments.text: ANDREW: Southwest, so that side of the hotel gets the sun in the afternoon and early evening.
segments.translation: 安德鲁：西南方向，所以酒店的那一边下午和傍晚的时候会有阳光照射。

segments.text: SAM: very nice.
segments.translation: 萨姆：非常棒。

segments.text: ANDREW: From the terrace you can see the area of trees within the grounds of the hotel, or you can stroll through there to the river -that's on the far side, so it isn't visible from the hotel.
segments.translation: 安德鲁：在露台上您可以看到酒店区域内的树木，或者您可以从那里漫步到河边，河在远处的地方，因此从酒店看不到。

segments.text: SAM: OK.
segments.translation: 萨姆：好的。

segments.text: ANDREW: Then another option is the Carlton Room.
segments.translation: 安德鲁：然后另一个选择是卡尔顿厅。

segments.text: This is a bit bigger - it can hold up to a hundred and ten people - and it has the advantage of a stage, which is useful if you have any entertainment, or indeed a small band can fit onto it.
segments.translation: 它要更大一点儿——可以容纳110人——它的优势是有一个舞台，如果您有任何的娱乐项目，甚至是请一支小乐队，它就派得上用场了。

segments.text: SAM: And can you go outside from the room?
segments.translation: 萨姆：从房间里可以去到外面吗？

segments.text: ANDREW: No, the Carlton Room is on the first floor, but on one side the windows look out onto the lake.
segments.translation: 安德鲁：不行，虽然卡尔顿厅在一楼，但其中一侧的窗户外就是一个湖。

segments.text: SAM: Lovely. I think either of those rooms would be suitable.
segments.translation: 萨姆：不错。我想两个房间中的任意一个都很合适。

segments.text: ANDREW: Can I tell you about some of the options we offer in addition?
segments.translation: 安德鲁：我可以告诉您一些我们提供的其他选择吗？

segments.text: SAM: Please do.
segments.translation: 萨姆：好的。

segments.text: ANDREW: As well as a meal, you can have an MC, a Master of Ceremonies, who'll be with you throughout the party.
segments.translation: 安德鲁：除了用餐之外，你还可以选择一个MC，即司仪，他将在整个聚会期间与你们在一起。

segments.text: SAM: What exactly is the MC's function?
segments.translation: 萨姆：司仪的作用具体是什么呢？

segments.text: I suppose they make a speech during the meal if we need one, do they?
segments.translation: 我猜如果我们需要，司仪会在用餐期间为我们致辞，对吗？

segments.text: ANDREW: That's right.
segments.translation: 安德鲁：是的。

segments.text: All our MCs are trained as public speakers, so they can easily get people's attention - many guests are glad to have someone who can make themselves heard above the chatter!
segments.translation: 我们所有的司仪都是训练有素的公共演讲者，所以他们很容易引起人们的注意——许多客人都很高兴有人能让他们的谈话被别人听到。

segments.text: And they're also your support - if anything goes wrong, the MC will deal with it, so you can relax.
segments.translation: 而且他们也会为你提供帮助——如果出现任何问题，司仪会去处理，所以你不用紧张。

segments.text: SAM: Great! I'll need to ask you about food, but something else that's important is accommodation.
segments.translation: 萨姆：棒极了！以后我还要问问你关于食物的事情，但还有一个重要的事情就是住宿。

segments.text: You obviously have rooms in the hotel, but do you also have any other accommodation, like cabins for example?
segments.translation: 显然酒店里有房间，但你们还有其他的住宿选择吗，比如小屋？

segments.text: ANDREW: Yes, there are five in the grounds, all self-contained.
segments.translation: 安德鲁：有的，场地中有五个小屋，都是独立的。

segments.text: They each sleep two to four people and have their own living room, bathroom and small kitchen.
segments.translation: 每间小屋可以容纳两到四个人，并有独立的客厅、浴室和小厨房。

segments.text: SAM: That sounds perfect for what we'll need.
segments.translation: 萨姆：听上去不错，正是我们想要的。

segments.text: SAM: Now you have various facilities, don't you?
segments.translation: 萨姆：你们有各种设施，对吧？

segments.text: Are they all included in the price of hiring the room?
segments.translation: 它们的费用都包含在租用房间的价格中吗？

segments.text: The pool, for instance.
segments.translation: 比如说游泳池。

segments.text: ANDREW: Normally you'd be able to use it, but it'll be closed throughout September for refurbishment. I'm afraid.
segments.translation: 安德鲁：通常情况下游泳池是可以使用的，但它恐怕将在9月关闭进行翻新。

segments.text: The gym will be available, though, at no extra charge.
segments.translation: 但健身房还是可以使用的，并且不收取额外费用。

segments.text: That's open all day, from six in the morning until midnight.
segments.translation: 健身房全天开放，从早上六点开到午夜。

segments.text: SAM: Right.
segments.translation: 萨姆：好的。

segments.text: ANDREW: And the tennis courts, but there is a small additional payment for those.
segments.translation: 安德鲁：还有网球场，但要收取一小笔额外费用。

segments.text: We have four courts, and it's worth booking in advance if you possibly can, as there can be quite a long waiting list for them.
segments.translation: 我们有四个球场，如果你们需要的话最好提前预定，因为排队预定的人会非常多。

segments.text: SAM: Right. Now could we discuss the food?
segments.translation: 萨姆：好的。现在，我们能讨论一下食物吗？

segments.text: This would be dinner, around seven o'clock …
segments.translation: 我们需要晚餐，在7点左右……
